title: Business Breakfast | Stock/Share Market News | 7th April 2026 | TV5 Money Live

recommendations.note: Add slowly on dips; very strong in tier-2/north & mid-north India, MP; valuations high but stock strong.
recommendations.detail: Add slowly on dips; very strong stock (tier-2 cities, north/mid-north India, Madhya Pradesh expansion). Valuations look a bit high but the stock is strong. Note: long term = 3-5 years, not 1-3.

recommendations.note: Add slowly on dips; strong stock even in this market.
recommendations.detail: Add slowly on dips; a very strong stock even in the current market.

recommendations.note: Hold without doubt; over-beaten/oversold, new unit & EV-ready, can rebound past 1,000+; PE only 16.
recommendations.detail: Caller at -50%. Over-beaten/oversold; new unit commissioned and EV-ready, company can rebound. Hold without any doubt; stock can cross 1,000+ if markets improve. PE only 16, rarely this cheap.

recommendations.note: Hold for now; semi-monopoly eroding like IRCTC, near 52-wk low; exit on a small rally toward 500.
recommendations.detail: Caller at -20%. Semi-monopoly status eroding (like IRCTC), near 52-week low; revenues stable. Hold for now; a small rally toward ~500 likely, exit at that time.

recommendations.note: Add on dips; strong Q4 business updates, jewellery space positive.
recommendations.detail: Add on dips; business updates strong; jewellery space positive (Senco Gold outperformed). Stock positive.

recommendations.note: Not the right time; enter oil-marketing companies only on crude-oil clarity or with risk appetite.
recommendations.detail: Not the right time; only if crude-oil clarity comes should one enter oil-marketing companies, otherwise only with a risk appetite. Keep strict stop-losses if entering.

recommendations.note: Cyclical; some momentum in graphite twins; only with risk appetite, keep strict stop-losses.
recommendations.detail: Cyclical stock; some momentum seen in graphite twins recently. Go only if there's risk appetite, otherwise keep strict stop-losses.

recommendations.note: First choice over Lodha; strong brands, consistent business, year-on-year wealth creation.
recommendations.detail: Lodha vs Pidilite (2-year horizon): prefer Pidilite as first choice. Strong brands, consistent business, creates wealth year on year. Realty (Lodha) slows in an economic slowdown.

recommendations.note: Strong realty company but realty slows in a downturn (enquiries dropping); second to Pidilite.
recommendations.detail: Strong realty company, no doubt, but in such crises/economic slowdown realty slows down (enquiries already dropping). Second choice after Pidilite.

recommendations.note: Hold; decent multiplied stock, but recovery will be slow, not immediate; copper/silver momentum changed.
recommendations.detail: Caller at -25%, likely bought at peak. One of the multiplied stocks of last 3-4 years; copper/silver momentum changed. Decent stock, rebound/recovery will come but slowly; hold for now.

recommendations.note: His pick among SBI vs Canara Bank vs Kotak for a single bank stock.
recommendations.detail: Asked to pick one of SBI / Canara Bank / Kotak Mahindra Bank for investment - Kutumba Rao's choice is SBI.
